SEARCH
Package io.github.lucfr1746.llibrary.itemstack

Record Class ItemAttributeBuilder

java.lang.Object
java.lang.Record
io.github.lucfr1746.llibrary.itemstack.ItemAttributeBuilder
Record Components:
itemStack - The ItemStack to which attribute modifiers will be applied.
public record ItemAttributeBuilder(@NotNull org.bukkit.inventory.ItemStack itemStack) extends Record
A builder class for managing and modifying attribute modifiers on an ItemStack. This builder provides a fluent API for handling attributes and ensures the immutability of the original ItemStack.

  • Constructor Details

    • ItemAttributeBuilder

      public ItemAttributeBuilder(@NotNull @NotNull org.bukkit.inventory.ItemStack itemStack)
      Constructs an ItemAttributeBuilder with the specified ItemStack. The ItemStack is cloned to prevent modifications to the original instance.
      Parameters:
      itemStack - the ItemStack to base the builder on (must not be null).
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if itemStack is null.

  • Method Details

    • addAttributeModifier

      public ItemAttributeBuilder addAttributeModifier(@NotNull @NotNull org.bukkit.attribute.Attribute attribute, @NotNull @NotNull org.bukkit.attribute.AttributeModifier modifier)
      Adds an attribute modifier to the ItemStack.
      Parameters:
      attribute - the attribute to add.
      modifier - the attribute modifier to add.
      Returns:
      a new ItemAttributeBuilder with the updated ItemStack.
      Throws:
      IllegalStateException - if the ItemMeta is null.

    • addAttributeModifier

      public ItemAttributeBuilder addAttributeModifier(@NotNull @NotNull org.bukkit.attribute.Attribute attribute, double amount, @Nullable org.bukkit.attribute.AttributeModifier.Operation operation, @Nullable @Nullable org.bukkit.inventory.EquipmentSlotGroup slot)
      Adds an attribute modifier with detailed parameters.
      Parameters:
      attribute - the attribute to add.
      amount - the value of the modifier.
      operation - the operation (defaults to AttributeModifier.Operation.ADD_NUMBER if null).
      slot - the equipment slot this modifier applies to (nullable for global effect).
      Returns:
      a new ItemAttributeBuilder with the updated ItemStack.

    • addAttributeModifier

      public ItemAttributeBuilder addAttributeModifier(@NotNull @NotNull org.bukkit.attribute.Attribute attribute, double amount, @NotNull org.bukkit.attribute.AttributeModifier.Operation operation)
      Adds an attribute modifier with the specified attribute, amount, and operation.
      Parameters:
      attribute - the attribute to modify. Must not be null.
      amount - the value of the modifier.
      operation - the operation to apply to the attribute. Must not be null.
      Returns:
      a new ItemAttributeBuilder with the updated ItemStack.
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if attribute or operation is null.

    • addAttributeModifier

      public ItemAttributeBuilder addAttributeModifier(@NotNull @NotNull org.bukkit.attribute.Attribute attribute, double amount, @NotNull @NotNull org.bukkit.inventory.EquipmentSlotGroup slot)
      Adds an attribute modifier with the specified attribute, amount, and equipment slot.
      Parameters:
      attribute - the attribute to modify. Must not be null.
      amount - the value of the modifier.
      slot - the equipment slot this modifier applies to. Must not be null.
      Returns:
      a new ItemAttributeBuilder with the updated ItemStack.
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if attribute or slot is null.

    • build

      public org.bukkit.inventory.ItemStack build()
      Builds and returns the modified ItemStack.
      Returns:
      the modified ItemStack.

    • getAttributeModifiers

      public com.google.common.collect.Multimap<org.bukkit.attribute.Attribute,org.bukkit.attribute.AttributeModifier> getAttributeModifiers()
      Retrieves all attribute modifiers from the ItemStack.
      Returns:
      a Multimap of attributes and their associated modifiers, or an empty map if none exist.

    • getAttributeModifiers

      public Collection<org.bukkit.attribute.AttributeModifier> getAttributeModifiers(@NotNull @NotNull org.bukkit.attribute.Attribute attribute)
      Retrieves attribute modifiers for a specific Attribute.
      Parameters:
      attribute - the attribute to query.
      Returns:
      a collection of AttributeModifier, or an empty collection if none are found.

    • getAttributeModifiers

      public com.google.common.collect.Multimap<org.bukkit.attribute.Attribute,org.bukkit.attribute.AttributeModifier> getAttributeModifiers(@NotNull @NotNull org.bukkit.inventory.EquipmentSlot slot)
      Retrieves all attribute modifiers applied to a specific equipment slot.
      Parameters:
      slot - the equipment slot to query. Must not be null.
      Returns:
      a Multimap of attributes and their associated modifiers for the specified slot, or an empty map if none exist.
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if slot is null.

    • hasAttributeModifiers

      public boolean hasAttributeModifiers()
      Checks if the ItemStack has any attribute modifiers.
      Returns:
      true if modifiers exist, false otherwise.

    • removeAttributeModifier

      public ItemAttributeBuilder removeAttributeModifier(@NotNull @NotNull org.bukkit.attribute.Attribute attribute, org.bukkit.attribute.AttributeModifier attributeModifier)
      Removes a specific attribute modifier for the given attribute from the ItemStack.
      Parameters:
      attribute - the attribute to remove the modifier from. Must not be null.
      attributeModifier - the specific modifier to remove. Can be null to remove all modifiers for the given attribute.
      Returns:
      a new ItemAttributeBuilder with the updated ItemStack.
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if attribute is null.

    • removeAttributeModifier

      public ItemAttributeBuilder removeAttributeModifier(@NotNull @NotNull org.bukkit.attribute.Attribute attribute)
      Removes all modifiers for a specific Attribute.
      Parameters:
      attribute - the attribute to remove modifiers from.
      Returns:
      a new ItemAttributeBuilder with the updated ItemStack.

    • removeAttributeModifier

      public ItemAttributeBuilder removeAttributeModifier(@NotNull @NotNull org.bukkit.inventory.EquipmentSlot slot)
      Removes all modifiers applied to a specific EquipmentSlot.
      Parameters:
      slot - the equipment slot to clear.
      Returns:
      a new ItemAttributeBuilder with the updated ItemStack.

    • setAttributeModifiers

      public ItemAttributeBuilder setAttributeModifiers(@NotNull @NotNull com.google.common.collect.Multimap<org.bukkit.attribute.Attribute,org.bukkit.attribute.AttributeModifier> modifiers)
      Sets custom attribute modifiers for the ItemStack.
      Parameters:
      modifiers - the Multimap of attributes and their modifiers.
      Returns:
      a new ItemAttributeBuilder with the updated ItemStack.
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if modifiers is null.

    • toItemBuilder

      public ItemBuilder toItemBuilder()
      Converts the AttributeBuilder to an ItemBuilder.
      Returns:
      an ItemBuilder initialized with the current item stack.

    • toString

      public final String toString()
      Returns a string representation of this record class. The representation contains the name of the class, followed by the name and value of each of the record components.
      Specified by:
      toString in class Record
      Returns:
      a string representation of this object

    • hashCode

      public final int hashCode()
      Returns a hash code value for this object. The value is derived from the hash code of each of the record components.
      Specified by:
      hashCode in class Record
      Returns:
      a hash code value for this object

    • equals

      public final boolean equals(Object o)
      Indicates whether some other object is "equal to" this one. The objects are equal if the other object is of the same class and if all the record components are equal. All components in this record class are compared with Objects::equals(Object,Object).
      Specified by:
      equals in class Record
      Parameters:
      o - the object with which to compare
      Returns:
      true if this object is the same as the o argument; false otherwise.

    • itemStack

      @NotNull public @NotNull org.bukkit.inventory.ItemStack itemStack()
      Returns the value of the itemStack record component.
      Returns:
      the value of the itemStack record component
